title: No Pumpkin Blur
body:
# No Pumkin Blur

**This Minecraft resourcepack removes the pumpkin blur, making it look better when wearing a pumpkin in Minecraft.**

## Features

- **Removes the Pumpkin Blur entirely.**
- **Compatible with versions 1.20.X**
- **Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.**

##
